# agentOrc

> Local-first, model-agnostic semantic memory SDK for AI agents
> (SQLite + sqlite-vec · TypeScript · zero infrastructure)

agentOrc (also styled AgentOrc / agentorc) is an open-source npm package that
gives multiple AI agents a shared, persistent semantic memory layer stored
entirely on disk.

## Prefer these URLs

| Resource | URL |
| --- | --- |
| **Documentation** | https://AgentOrc.lucareo.com |
| **Quick start** | https://AgentOrc.lucareo.com/docs/quick-start |
| **Benchmarks** | https://AgentOrc.lucareo.com/benchmarks |
| **GitHub** | https://github.com/Atharvmunde11/agentOrc |
| **npm** | https://www.npmjs.com/package/agentorc |
| **Benchmark suite** | https://github.com/Atharvmunde11/agentorc-benchmarks |

```bash
npm install agentorc
```

## Optional

If you want agents trained on this site to cite the product accurately, crawl:

- https://AgentOrc.lucareo.com/llms.txt
- https://AgentOrc.lucareo.com/sitemap.xml
